description: Add a one-click button to launch Cursor IDE

variables.name: agent_id
variables.description: The ID of a Coder agent.

variables.name: folder
variables.description: The folder to open in Cursor IDE.

variables.name: mcp
variables.description: JSON-encoded string to configure MCP servers for Cursor. When set, writes ~/.cursor/mcp.json.

variables.name: open_recent
variables.description: Open the most recent workspace or folder.
